pr.title: Record: 11L LatentMask TTT + GPTQ + Product-Key Bigram + Brotli — val_bpb 1.1158 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: 11L GPT uses LatentMask TTT per-channel masks, Product-Key bigram embeddings, alternating gated/XSA layers, and Brotli compression to squeeze into 16MB.
techniques: LatentMask per-channel sigmoid masks trained during score-first Muon-lite TTT
Product-Key bigram factorization replacing hash tables for zero-collision embeddings
Brotli-11 + uint8 log-scale serialization plus alternating gated/XSA layers to pack 16MB
